title: Oaks Better Beds
description: A simple light-weight vanilla+ better beds resourcepack
body:
## Disclaimer
This Resource Pack will only work for version 26.2 snapshot 3 and above

## Description
Upgrade your Minecraft beds with a redesigned custom bed model that adds detail, and personality to your builds. This resource pack enhances the classic be, while still preserving the familiar vanilla style.

## Changelog
### v1.0
- Full Release
### v1.1
- Fixed Minor Z-Fighting issue with beds against walls.
### v1.2
- Fixed Z-Fighting issue when beds where side by side
- Replaced bed_down texture with oaks_planks inside the json for better resource pack compat
